content:
# 10 Best AI Tools for Marketers in 2026 — Boost Your Campaigns

Marketers, get ready to work 10x faster with AI! Here are our top picks for 2026!

For more tools, check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] and [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]]!

---

## Quick Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Pricing | Key Features |
|------|-----------|---------|---------------|
| [[link:/tools/18|Jasper]] | Long-form & SEO writing | $49+/month | 60+ templates, brand voice |
| [[link:/tools/74|Copy.ai]] | Short-form marketing copy | $36+/month | 90+ templates, free tier |
| [[link:/tools/51|VEED.io]] | Marketing video creation | $12+/month | Auto-subtitles, text-to-video |
| [[link:/tools/29|Pika Labs]] | Creative social videos | Free beta | Generative video, styles |
| [[link:/tools/2|DALL-E 3]] | Marketing images | $0.04+/image | Photorealistic, text rendering |

---

## 1. Jasper (Best for Long-form & Brand Voice)

Perfect for blog posts, email sequences, and consistent brand messaging!

---

## 2. Copy.ai (Best for Short-form Copy)

Social posts, ad copy, product descriptions — all fast and easy!

---

## 3. VEED.io (Best for Marketing Videos)

Create professional marketing videos, social reels, and explainer videos in minutes!

---

## 4. Pika Labs (Best for Creative Video)

For stylized, eye-catching social media videos!

---

## 5. DALL-E 3 (Best for Marketing Imagery)

Create product mockups, social graphics, and banner ads!

---

## Our Final Tip

Always start with free tiers to test, then scale up!
